# Q-Asker

> Free AI quiz generator that creates fill-in-the-blank, true/false, and
> multiple-choice questions from uploaded PDF, PPT, and Word files.

Q-Asker is a Korean-built, multilingual (Korean/English) web application
for students and educators. Upload any study document and receive AI-generated
quizzes within seconds. No signup required. Files are deleted after 24 hours.

## Use Cases

- University exam preparation from lecture slide PDFs
- Corporate training quizzes from Word policy documents
- Language learning question sets from textbook PDFs
- OCR-based quiz creation from scanned documents

## Key Differentiators

- Free with no account required
- OCR support for image-based and scanned documents
- Page-range selection for targeted quiz generation
- Detailed explanations with source page preview
- Quiz history management for long-term review

## Supported File Formats

PDF, PPT, PPTX, DOC, DOCX

## Question Types

- Fill-in-the-blank (빈칸 채우기)
- True/False (OX 퀴즈)
- Multiple-choice (객관식)

## Links

- Homepage: https://www.q-asker.com
